name: veritio-monorepo
description: Protocol-first OSS evidence layer for application audit trails, consent history, data subject workflows, retention, and compliance exports.

scripts.build: bun run --cwd sdks/typescript build && bun run --cwd adapters/better-auth build
scripts.test: bun run --cwd sdks/typescript build && bun test sdks/typescript/src && bun test adapters/better-auth/src && PYTHONPATH=sdks/python/src python3 -m unittest discover -s sdks/python/tests && cd sdks/go && go test ./...
scripts.test:better-auth: bun run --cwd sdks/typescript build && bun test adapters/better-auth/src
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd sdks/typescript typecheck && bun run --cwd sdks/typescript build && bun run --cwd adapters/better-auth typecheck
scripts.verify: bun run test && bun run typecheck && bun run build
